title: Peaches and Plums!
body:
# Inspiration
This modpack was inspired by my two favorite Cavalier puppies, Peach and Plum!!

This modpack was designed to be as cozy and precious as they are! Featuring cozy mods like Supplementaries and Farmer's Delight!

It also contains mods for the tech-centered person! Like Create and Travelers Backpack!

# Steam Deck Verified!
For MAXIMUM Coziness! Download the Prism Launcher (Or Modrinth), and search for Peaches and Plums!

I've tested and verified it works great on Steam Deck, thanks to user @ThatOneJax for suggesting the addition of Embeddium! As well as configuring / designing the Discord server!!

# Join the Peaches and Plums Discord Server!
Come on in! [Join Here](https://discord.gg/fYf2xaWf)
